Description:
Model
Brand: Corsair
Model: Scimitar Elite Wireless SE
Part Number: CH-9314011-WW


Details
Type Type: Bluetooth / 2.4GHz
Interface: USB 2.0
Tracking Method Tracking Method: Optical
Resolution (DPI) Resolution (DPI): 33000 dpi
Hand Orientation Hand Orientation: Right Hand
Buttons: 16
Scrolling Capability: 1 x Wheel
Color: White


Features
Features: Phenomenally Precise 33k DPI MARKSMAN S: Hit headshots, scan the entire map, ping teammates all with amazing accuracy thanks to the MARKSMAN S 33k DPI optical sensor. With improved DPI detection, IPS tracking, and lower power consumption over the previous version, it’s definitely a worthy upgrade.
16 Programmable Buttons: All the powers in the world, right at your fingertips. Have a button ready for every power, consumable, action, and attack with 16 programmable buttons. 
Elgato Stream Deck Integration: Native Elgato Stream Deck integration allows you to directly map Stream Deck functions to the SCIMITAR ELITE WIRELESS SE from the Stream Deck App, so your most important functions are just a button away.
Elgato Virtual Stream Deck Integration: This mouse can also utilize Elgato’s Virtual Stream Deck integration to give your 16 buttons more functionality than ever. Map buttons to their own Virtual Stream Deck to build out profiles for productivity, gaming, streaming, and more.
Fast, Low-Latency Wireless Freedom: Ditch the cords and the lag. SLIPSTREAM WIRELESS offers a low-latency connection on PC or Mac with 1,000Hz polling. Alternatively connect via Bluetooth or USB to charge while you play.
Up to 150-Hour Wireless Battery: Say goodbye to battery anxiety, get up to 150 hours of raiding, grinding, and looting on a single charge. Fully recharges in just 90 minutes or less.
Lightning-Fast Optical Switches: Eliminate debounce delay and attack with astonishing speed thanks to the optical switches for left and right clicks.
Comfortable For any Size Hand: Adjust the patented Key Slider to get 12 buttons in perfectly position for your thumb. The mouse’s contoured shape provides a comfortable grip and helps to reduce wrist strain.
100% PTFE Mouse Feet: Mouse feet made from 100% ultra-low-friction PTFE pads provide a smooth glide.


Package Contents
Package Contents: CORSAIR SCIMITAR ELITE WIRELESS SE MMO Gaming Mouse
Braided USB Type-C cable
USB type A wireless receiver
Allen Key
